response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience and one early stint contributing C/C++ components to an IDE (NI LabWindows/CVI), but the resume shows no demonstrable depth in Java, Kotlin, or the Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate ecosystem that this role centers on. Primary stacks are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang; Java is listed only as a skill with limited project context, and there is no evidence of JVM internals or enterprise-framework tooling work.
strengths: Long career across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Some IDE tooling exposure via NI LabWindows/CVI (C/C++)
concerns: No Kotlin experience and no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate background
No demonstrated deep JVM or language-tooling expertise
Recent work is TypeScript/Node and DLang, not enterprise Java
